About Greymatter Accountancy

Intelligent accounting for London's ambitious businesses

Our Story

Greymatter Accountancy was founded on a simple principle: accounting should serve business strategy, not hinder it. We started as a boutique practice focused on understanding how our clients operate — not just their numbers, but their ambitions, challenges, and growth plans.

Over 15 years, we've grown to serve 500+ clients across London, from ambitious startups in Shoreditch to established firms in the City. Every client relationship is built on deep understanding and genuine commercial insight.

Our Philosophy

Grey Matter — the substance of intelligence. We apply rigorous analytical thinking to every engagement, solving complex accounting challenges with commercial pragmatism.

Think Differently

Every business is unique. We reject templates and apply bespoke thinking to your specific structure and challenges.

Partnership Approach

We're not just service providers — we're part of your team, invested in your success and available when you need us.

Results-Driven

Compliance is table-stakes. We focus on tax optimization, strategic insight, and actionable financial intelligence.

Why Choose Greymatter?

Same-Day Responsiveness

Based in London's financial district, we understand the pace of business and respond accordingly. Your questions get answered fast.

Big 4 Experience, Boutique Service

Our partners trained at leading firms. We bring institutional rigor with genuine accessibility and commercial flexibility.

Industry Specialists

Deep expertise in property, tech, creative, professional services, and hospitality. We speak your business language.

Fixed Pricing, Transparent Fees

No surprises. We quote fixed monthly or project fees. Costs are predictable and aligned with service delivery.

Regulatory Credentials

Trust is everything in accounting. Greymatter is:

  • ACCA Registered - Association of Chartered Certified Accountants
  • Audit Approved - Registered to carry out audit work under UK audit rules
  • Professional Indemnity Insured - Full coverage protecting your interests
  • Compliant with HMRC - Latest tax legislation and Making Tax Digital standards
  • GDPR Compliant - Your data security is our priority

Our Team

We're a team of experienced accountants, tax specialists, and financial advisors dedicated to your success. Meet our leadership:

SO

Sarah Okonkwo

Managing Director, FCCA

15+ years in practice. Expert in audit, financial reporting, and strategic business advisory. Sarah leads our audit practice.

JV

James Varghese

Audit & Assurance Lead

Former Big 4 auditor with expertise in internal controls, financial compliance, and assurance for complex structures.

ER

Elena Rossi

Tax & Compliance Specialist, CTA

CTA qualified. Specialist in corporation tax planning, R&D relief, and Making Tax Digital compliance.

Ready to Work with Greymatter?

Let's discuss how we can help your business thrive.
